profile.title: Complete
profile.quote: “Realize your dream career in Japan with a trusted institution.”
profile.p1: Jissho Foundation is a trusted Japanese job training institution with extensive experience in preparing high-quality Indonesian workers to work in Japan. We provide comprehensive training programs covering Japanese language, work culture, and job placement assistance with high professional standards.
profile.p2: With a structured curriculum and experienced teachers, we are committed to helping every participant achieve career success in the Land of the Rising Sun with thorough preparation. Since our establishment, we have sent hundreds of alumni who are now successfully building their careers in various leading Japanese companies.

magang.title: Internship
magang.description: Technical internship program to Japan with a duration of 3–5 years for professional skill development.

requirement.title: What is the Internship Program at Jissho?
requirement.description: Want to build an international career and sharpen your professional skills directly in the Land of the Rising Sun? Let's check the requirement points below before you register!

g1.title: General Requirements (Character & Physical)
g1.i1: Age: Minimum 18 years and maximum 26–28 years (some specific sectors allow up to 30 years).
g1.i2: Minimum Education: Graduate of Senior High School (SMA), Vocational School (SMK), MA, Diploma (D3), or Bachelor's (S1) in any major.
g1.i4: Physical Health: Physically and mentally healthy, no history of chronic diseases (such as TB, hepatitis, asthma, or severe fractures).
g1.i5: Special Physical Conditions: No tattoos, no piercings (for males), and not color blind (partial or total).

g2.title: Document Requirements (Administration)
g2.description: Ensure the following official documents are ready in original and copy forms:
g2.i3: Last Diploma + Transcript of Grades / Report Card.
g2.i4: Consent Letter from Parent / Guardian / Husband / Wife (notarized).
g2.i6: Latest passport photo with white/red background (according to LPK provisions).

g3.title: Competency & Mental Requirements
g3.i1: Learning Commitment: Willing to participate in Centralized Work Training (Diklat) for Japanese language and culture (usually up to N5 or N4 level).
g3.i2: Attitude: Have high discipline, strong mentality, and able to work in a team.
g3.i3: Official Permission: Get full support from family to work abroad during the contract period (usually 3 to 5 years).

duration.title: Total Contract Duration: 3 to 8 Years
duration.description: The main work contract lasts for 3 years, with an opportunity for extension up to 8 years if participants pass the technical evaluation exam in Japan.

t1.title: Phase 1: Training in Indonesia (Pre-Departure Training)
t1.desc: Activities: Intensive Japanese language training (minimum target equivalent to N5/N4), physical, mental, and discipline formation (FMD), and introduction to Japanese work culture at LPK.

t2.title: Phase 2: Internship Year 1 (Ginou Jisshuu 1-Gou)
t2.duration: 1 Year (Including the first month of adaptation/Kenshuu)
t2.desc: Activities: Focus on environmental adaptation, mastery of job basics, and daily language in the receiving company.

t3.title: Phase 3: Internship Year 2 & 3 (Ginou Jisshuu 2-Gou)
t3.desc: Activities: Full technical skill improvement. At the end of year 3, participants will take practical and theoretical exams to obtain an official certificate.

t4.title: Phase 4: Extension Year 4 to 8 (Ginou Jisshuu 3-Gou - Optional)
t4.desc: Activities: Specifically for participants who have a very good work track record and pass the intermediate level exam. Participants are entitled to return to Indonesia first (leave) before continuing the last 5 years of the contract.

benefit.title: Why Choose the Internship Program with Us?
benefit.description: We don't just send you off, but we also ensure you are ready to compete, succeed, and are protected while in Japan.

b1.title: Japanese Standard Salary & Allowances (According to Regulation)
b1.desc: Get a competitive monthly income according to the minimum wage standard in Japan, complete with overtime pay, health insurance, and work accident insurance.

b2.title: Intensive Language & Culture Training (Job Ready)
b2.desc: Training curriculum specifically designed by experienced teachers so you master the Japanese language and understand Japanese work culture before flying.

b3.title: Job Placement to Trusted & Official Companies
b3.desc: Our LPK works directly with legal Receiving Companies and official Sending Organizations that are strictly supervised by the Indonesian and Japanese governments.

b4.title: Full Assistance (From Training to Return)
b4.desc: We assist you from the administrative process, passport/visa application, departure, monitoring conditions during your stay in Japan, until your return to your homeland.

b5.title: Official International Certificate (JITCO/OTIT)
b5.desc: After completing the program, you will get an official competency certificate which becomes a golden asset and an extraordinary added value for your career.

b6.title: Opportunity to Continue to Work Program (Specified Skilled Worker / SSW)
b6.desc: For outstanding internship alumni, we provide a special pathway to return to work in Japan with a specified skilled worker visa.

kerja.title: Work
kerja.description: Professional work visa for skilled workers in various Japanese industry sectors.

ssw1.title: SSW Type 1 (特定技能1号)
ssw1.durationDesc: Can be extended up to 10 years or more
ssw1.i2: Pass skills exam and JLPT/JFT N4
